name: storylab
description: A governed long-form fiction studio with pre-agenda story-state alignment, host-mediated user decisions, isolated authorship, independent literary diagnosis, and continuity control.

interface.shortDescription: Governed long-form fiction with isolated authorship.
interface.longDescription: Storylab keeps all user dialogue in the main task while specialized subagents return bounded consultations. Before generating a discussion agenda, it describes the achieved story state and repeats clarification until the user explicitly says nothing remains. It then presents option-backed questions with one recommendation, confirms one decision at a time, isolates the author from planning controls, preserves independent reading evidence, and leaves final taste authority with the user.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a governed long-form fiction project with Storylab.
Commission and draft the next chapter through isolated authorship.
Cold-read, diagnose, and continuity-check the current chapter.
